motion.name: ease-precision
motion.purpose: Body map assembly and focused reveals.

components.name: Body Training Map
components.description: Accurate anatomy map with weekly load fill and latest-workout edge state.
components.css: .ds-body-map { background: #120d24; color: #f8f5ff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-body-map:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #71fff1; outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview: Health OS is a compact, calibrated, responsive personal performance instrument. Data trust beats generated spectacle.
keyCharacteristics: Indigo-violet atmosphere with restrained coral and neon signals.
Accurate anatomical overlays with clear weekly and latest-session semantics.
Crisp motion, short timings, no bounce or elastic effects.

rules.name: The Neon Is Evidence Rule
rules.body: Neon cyan is not decoration. It means latest workout, focus, or live interaction.

rules.name: The Flat Until It Moves Rule
rules.body: Static surfaces stay calm. Elevation appears as feedback or hierarchy.

dos: Do keep the body map anatomically accurate and data-driven.
Do keep motion short, crisp, and reversible.
donts: Don't use imagegen realism that compromises highlight alignment.
Don't make users wait through cinematic choreography to read today's decision.
